calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: G.Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Continued To Nov-22-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanction $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC has been cont'd to NOV-22-2022. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: JLee; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Continued To Sep-20-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to September 20, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
